basic_details.job_title: WCCB – Stenographer, Driver and More – 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB) invites applications for 11 posts of Public Prosecutor - 1, Stenographer Grade-I - 4, Upper Division Clerk - 1, Stenographer Grade-III -2, Head Constable/Forest Guards -1, and Driver - 2 from 10th, 12th, and Graduate candidates with relevant experience, and the offline application process will run from 27-04-2026 to 10-06-2026 at wccb.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Law, Stenographers, 12th Pass, 10th Pass, and other relevant qualifications as per post.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Levels 2-10 as per 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCCB Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: WCCB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Stenographer, Stenographer and More Posts
